title: Morning Glory
description: RPG Theme, Improves the loot given to you every morning by your cat
body:
## ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/989/293/morning-glory-header.png)  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/989/697/cat-good-morning.png)

Description

Improves your cat morning gifts

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)   

In vanilla Minecraft, the morning gifts given to players can be limited and phantom membrane is rarely given.  This changes the loot given by player cats every morning to an improved list of loot. See below list of items you can now receive as your morning gift from your cat.

  Common - Rabbit Hide - Rabbit Foot - Raw Chicken - Feather - Rotten Flesh - String - Phantom Membrane - Melon Slice Slightly Rare - Diamond - Golden Apple - Golden Carrot - Totem of Undying Rare - Amethyst Shard - Heart of the Sea - Wither Skeleton Skull - Echo Shard - Sponge - Trial Key (1.21+) Extremely Rare - End Crystal - Nautilus Shell - Nether Star - Ominous Bottle (1.21+)     Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!
